input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.7.10.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.7.10.2
            TITLE: each shutdown button must be a push-pull or push-rotate emergency switch

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.7.10.2: Each Shutdown Button must be a push-pull or push-rotate emergency switch
EV.7.10.2 Each Shutdown Button must be a push-pull or push-rotate emergency switch

final_answer: Each Shutdown Button must be a push-pull or push-rotate emergency switch
